title: Auth: signup/login/logout + sessions + route protection

task.description: Implement email+password auth with signup/login pages, session cookie, logout endpoint, and middleware route protection. Add redirect rules: new users go to /train; untrained users redirected to /train.
acceptance_criteria: /signup validates email format and password min length; invalid email blocks submit and shows inline error.
/login with wrong credentials returns 401 and shows auth error banner; user stays logged out.
Successful signup creates user, sets session cookie, and redirects to /train.
Successful login sets session; redirects to / if trained else /train (verified by navigation).
Protected routes (/train,/generate,/history,/editor/:id) redirect to /login when no session; /api returns 401 for unauthenticated.

definition_of_done: Auth endpoints return correct status codes (200/401/400)
Middleware protects pages and API routes consistently
ui_requirements: Login/Signup use Card with Header/Title/Description; FormField wraps Input. Primary Button submit, secondary link cross-link Login<->Signup. Error state: banner (ErrorState) with message. Loading: disable Button + show skeleton.
